name: Banana Cake - Fruit Sweet
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Fruit Sweet (peach, pear, and pineapple juice and syrup)
1/4 cup Sour cream or ricotta cheese
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Spray a 9-inch square pan with non-stick cooking spray.
In a large bowl, cream together the butter and Fruit Sweet until smooth.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the mashed bananas, vanilla, and sour cream.
Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; add to the dry ingredients alternately with the buttermilk, mixing until just combined.
Fold in the chopped nuts (and shredded coconut, if using).
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Note: Turn off the oven when done. Let cool slightly before removing from pan.
